---
title: "test_dispatcher_help_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_dispatcher_help_empire.py"
loc: 25
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.57
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.86
---

## Intent
The `test_dispatcher_help_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestCorvusDispatcher, dispatcher, test_discover_all, test_show_help_categorization. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestCorvusDispatcher, dispatcher, test_discover_all, test_show_help_categorization. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.cstar_dispatcher](file://src.core.cstar_dispatcher)

### Exports
- `TestCorvusDispatcher`
- `dispatcher`
- `test_discover_all`
- `test_show_help_categorization`
